migrations.description: Major architecture rewrite with new configuration format

steps.title: Update installation method
steps.description: npm install replaced with direct binary download
steps.after:
# Download from GitHub releases
curl -L https://github.com/anthropics/claude-code/releases/latest/download/claude-code-macos -o /usr/local/bin/claude-code
chmod +x /usr/local/bin/claude-code
steps.notes: npm package deprecated in v2.0. Binary installation is now recommended.

steps.title: Migrate settings.json structure
steps.description: Permissions model changed to granular tool-based system
steps.notes: Old autoApprove flag removed. Use permission wildcards instead.

steps.title: Update CLAUDE.md location
steps.description: Project instructions moved from root to .claude/
steps.notes: All Claude Code files now live in .claude/ directory

steps.title: Add MCP tool configuration
steps.notes: MCP servers extend Claude with custom tools. Optional feature.

steps.title: Migrate to new skills directory
steps.notes: Skills have dedicated directories for better organization
